quotes.text: Do not be afraid of difficulties — they come only to test your strength. Learn to rise, not bow.
quotes.author: Harivansh Rai Bachchan

quotes.text: Life is a journey. The road is more beautiful than the destination. Every step holds a new wonder.
quotes.author: Gulzar

quotes.text: You have a right to perform your duties, but not to the fruits thereof. Let not the fruits of action be your motive.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.text: Take up one idea. Make that one idea your life. Think of it, dream of it, live on that idea.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.text: Change yourself and the world changes. Improve yourself and life improves.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: What feels hard today becomes tomorrow's strength. Struggle is what shapes a person.
quotes.author: Chanakya

quotes.text: He who greets the rising sun awakens new hope within himself. Every morning is a new beginning.
quotes.author: Kabir Das

quotes.text: The person who recognises their fear can also defeat it. Don't run from your fear — face it.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.text: Time, once passed, never returns. So live every moment, and cherish every relationship.
quotes.author: Tulsidas

quotes.text: One whose heart holds compassion, whose words hold truth, and whose hands hold purpose — that person is truly great.
quotes.author: Saint Kabir

quotes.text: A wise man learns more from his enemies than a fool from his friends.
quotes.author: Chanakya

quotes.text: Do not wait for the perfect time; start where you are and make it perfect along the way.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: Life isn’t about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.text: When a person performs their duty with sincerity and detachment, peace naturally follows their actions.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita

quotes.text: Wisdom grows not from never falling, but from rising every time we do.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Do not wait for the perfect moment. Take the moment and make it perfect.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Your attitude determines your direction in life.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: A real friend is one who walks in when the rest of the world walks out.
quotes.author: Walter Winchell

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: Dreams are not those you see in sleep. Dreams are those that don't let you sleep.
quotes.author: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

quotes.text: Be the change you wish to see in the world. The change begins within, not without.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new. Mistakes are the road to learning.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein
